subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and the eloquent and fluent verses therein were even as flowing water in their perfect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و اشعار فصیح و بلیغ که مانند آب روان در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @demons and evil spirits, @the power of words; of speech, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
